sections.singleColumnBody: Choose Single in Paragraph layout for one main text column without per-section titles. Use Multi when you need repeated section title + body blocks with the same typography throughout.

paragraphRows.body: Multi layout: optional section titles use one style; body text uses one style for every row. Optional text links are supported per section.
paragraphRows.title: First section

paragraphRows.body: The next block has no rail title—it continues under this same left label, which is the recommended way to split a long story without repeating the heading.
paragraphRows.title: Second section

paragraphRows.body: This block intentionally leaves Rail title empty so copy flows in one column under “Multi — sections”. Pair spacing: Padding above = none.
paragraphRows.title: Continuation row

items.body: Choose FAQ when each item is a short question and a supporting answer. Use paragraphs when you want free-form sections and optional inline links.
items.title: When does accordion vs paragraphs?

items.body: Yes. Omit the rail title on follow-up blocks so the layout continues the previous column title—useful for long reads split across multiple Sanity entries.
items.title: Can the rail title stay empty?

items.body: Ghost and minimal suit dense text; subtle and bold add band emphasis. Match neighbouring blocks for rhythm.
items.title: Which surfaces work best?

sections.body: No media. Centred text layout.
sections.title: Text only

sections.body: Text and image stacked, full viewport.
sections.title: Stacked edge to edge

sections.body: Text and image stacked, within grid.
sections.title: Stacked contained

sections.body: Text on top of image, full viewport.
sections.title: Overlay edge to edge

sections.body: Text on top of image, within grid.
sections.title: Overlay contained

sections.description: Block title, description, and one section CTA sit above the split; text column uses larger single-paragraph typography.
sections.headline: Single section · image right · centred intro
sections.singleBody: Pair a single subtitle and body with one shared image when the story does not need to break into subsections—product launches, flagship claims, or a calm band between heavier blocks.

sections.headline: Single section · image left · 4:5
sections.singleBody: Image on the left suits portraits, device mockups, or alternating rhythm with the previous band. Framing stays left-aligned for editorial flow.

sections.description: Several stacked rows with smaller type; one image shared across all rows.
sections.headline: Multiple sections · 1:1 media · subtle sparkle

items.body: Use multi layout when you want bite-sized points—specs, delivery promises, or checklist-style copy—beside a single hero visual.
items.subtitle: Scan-friendly rows

items.body: Each row keeps its own subtitle and body while the media column stays fixed until you swap layouts.
items.subtitle: Same image, new headline

items.body: 1:1 works well for pack shots, app tiles, or symmetrical products. Match surface emphasis to neighbouring bands for page rhythm.
items.subtitle: Square crop

accordionItems.body: Each accordion item can ship its own image or video and aspect ratio; the visible media follows the open panel.
accordionItems.subtitle: First panel

accordionItems.body: Use when copy clusters belong to distinct visuals—e.g. modes, colourways, or step-by-step stories.
accordionItems.subtitle: Second panel

accordionItems.body: Try 1:1 here for a different crop without leaving the accordion pattern.
accordionItems.subtitle: Third panel

sections.description: Opening a panel updates the media column to that panel’s asset. Gradient minimal background (lab component).
sections.headline: Accordion · per-panel media · minimal gradient

sections.description: Strong emphasis inverts typography; use sparingly between lighter bands.
sections.headline: Bold band · multi paragraphs · image left

items.body: Bold + sparkle or neutral surfaces suit closing arguments, limited offers, or moments that need clear separation from ghost/minimal sections above.
items.subtitle: High-contrast row

items.body: Keep rows short: inverted surfaces read best with concise copy and confident hierarchy.
items.subtitle: Second row

sections.body: 80 million songs. Unlimited emotions. One app that gets you.
sections.title: Every song you love. Every language you speak.

sections.body: From Tamil melodies to Punjabi beats, Bengali poetry to Malayalam rhythms — JioSaavn understands that your music library should sound like your life. Separate recommendation engines for each language ensure your Telugu playlist stays Telugu, while your Hindi discoveries stay fresh.
sections.title: Music speaks every language. So do we.
Built for how India really listens

sections.body: 320kbps streaming when your connection is strong. Adaptive quality that never breaks the song. Offline downloads that sound as good as live streams. Because music deserves to be heard exactly as the artist intended.
sections.title: Every note. Every breath. Crystal clear.

sections.body: Your Monday morning energy isn't your Friday night vibe. Your workout playlist shouldn't sound like your focus music. JioSaavn learns the difference — and finds songs that fit each moment perfectly.
sections.title: Discovers the songs you didn't know you needed

sections.body: Send songs to your group chat. Build playlists with friends across cities. See what your siblings are playing right now. Because the best discoveries come from people who know your taste.
sections.title: Music sounds better when shared
Built for how friends really share music

sections.body: Built for Jio's network. Optimized for every connection strength. From 5G speeds in metros to reliable 4G in villages — your music never stops because Jio never stops reaching further.
sections.title: Streams perfectly on the network that connects India

sections.body: Download free. Explore millions of songs immediately. Upgrade to Pro anytime for the ultimate experience. Your music journey begins now.
sections.title: Start listening. Start discovering. Start connecting.

sections.body:
Our mission is simple: Put people in charge of their lives. Because when they do, there's no limit to what's possible.

They can solve problems. Invent new things.
Create beauty. Make miracles.
Even change the world.
sections.title:
We exist to empower,
enable and inspire
1.4 billion Indians.

sections.body: From the Jio network where it all began, to people, products, places, platforms and partners— Everything is part of our JioFamily.
sections.title: Connection is at our core.

sections.subhead:
That's how we see a truly scalable brand.
Flexible. Inclusive. Ready for all.
sections.title:
For everyone,
everywhere.
For every need of life.

sections.body: From HNIs to farmers, students to women, startups to global giants, partners to employees.
sections.title: For everyone.

sections.body: From Kashmir to Kanyakumari, from Gujarat to Arunachal and from India to the world.
sections.title: For everywhere.

sections.body: From work to wellness, learning to leisure and everything in between. Our ecosystems support every part of life.
sections.title: For every need.

sections.headline: Keep track of what matters
sections.subheadline: With JioTag attached to your keys, wallet, luggage or gadgets, you get peace of mind: never worry about lost or forgotten belongings. Smart-tracker simplicity meets powerful global networks — all in a compact device that fits your daily life.

items.description: Keys, wallets, and the small things you reach for every morning—found fast when they slip under a cushion or into a tote.
items.title: Everyday essentials

items.description: One tag per person, or shared items everyone borrows—so school bags, umbrellas, and chargers do not vanish without a trace.
items.title: Family & shared items

items.description: Check tags before you leave the hotel, the cab, or the carousel—especially when connections are tight and every minute counts.
items.title: Travel & luggage

items.description: Android and iPhone in the same home—pair the right JioTag to the right network so everyone sees what they need on their phone.
items.title: Mixed-device households

items.description: Get nudges when your item moves out of range or when the network spots it—without drowning in noise.
items.title: Notifications you can trust

items.description: Lean on familiar Find My and Find My Device flows so the path back to your item feels obvious, not technical.
items.title: Guided recovery

items.description: Small enough for a keyring or luggage tag, tough enough for daily commutes, school runs, and baggage holds.
items.title: Built for real life

accordionItems.body: Uses a standard CR2032 battery that lasts up to 12 months, with a spare often included — and you can replace it yourself in seconds, no tools needed.
accordionItems.subtitle: Year-Long Battery, Replaceable Cell

accordionItems.body: Compact at just 38.2 × 38.2 × 7.2 mm and only 9–10 g, JioTag attaches easily to keys, wallets, bags, or luggage without adding bulk — simply treat it like any other key accessory.
accordionItems.subtitle: Lightweight & Discreet

sections.headline: Long battery life & low maintenance

items.body: Uses a standard CR2032 battery that lasts up to 12 months, with a spare often included — and you can replace it yourself in seconds, no tools needed.
items.subtitle: Year-Long Battery, Replaceable Cell

sections.singleBody: Uses a standard CR2032 battery that lasts up to 12 months, with a spare often included — and you can replace it yourself in seconds, no tools needed.

accordionItems.body: JioTag Go taps into Google’s Find My Device network on Android, while JioTag Air connects to Apple’s Find My network for global, beyond-Bluetooth tracking on iPhone, iPad, and Mac.
accordionItems.subtitle: Works with Your Ecosystem — Android and iOS

accordionItems.body: Uses Bluetooth and community networks with no SIM or subscription — just pair it once and it quietly tracks in the background with minimal upkeep.
accordionItems.subtitle: No SIM or Subscription Needed

sections.headline: Effortless Setup That Works Across Your Devices

items.body: Uses a standard CR2032 battery that lasts up to 12 months, with a spare often included — and you can replace it yourself in seconds, no tools needed.
items.subtitle: Year-Long Battery, Replaceable Cell

sections.singleBody: Uses a standard CR2032 battery that lasts up to 12 months, with a spare often included — and you can replace it yourself in seconds, no tools needed.

items.description: With crystal clear sound,  radiant colours and durable built.
items.title: JioTag Go

items.description: With crystal clear sound,  radiant colours and durable built.
items.title: JioTag Air

items.description: The JioFind series is now available at your favourite online retailer - JioMart.
items.title: Shop from JioMart

items.description: JioMart delivers JioFind quickly to your home, with zero delivery charges anywhere in India.
items.title: Free and fast delivery

items.description: If you face any issues with your order, just reach out to JioMart’s customer care team.
items.title: We’re here for you

items.body: JioTag Go is built for Android phones and tablets using Google’s Find My Device network. JioTag Air is for iPhone, iPad, and Mac on Apple’s Find My network. Pick the one that matches the phone you carry every day.
items.title: Which JioTag do I need — Go or Air?

items.body: No. JioTag uses Bluetooth plus the relevant finder network. There is no separate SIM or subscription to manage for core tracking—just pair once in the MyJio or compatible app flow.
items.title: Do I need a SIM or a monthly plan?

items.body: Location is relayed through encrypted, rotating identifiers on the finder network. You see your item; other people do not see your identity in the exchange. Exact behaviour follows Google and Apple’s network policies.
items.title: How private is community finding?

items.body: Battery life depends on how often the tag connects and how often it is played to ring. Under typical use you should expect longer stretches between replacements than daily-charge gadgets—check in-box guidance for your model.
items.title: What is the battery life like?

items.description: For Android. Uses Google’s Find My Device network for beyond-Bluetooth locating where supported.
items.title: JioTag Go

items.description: For iPhone, iPad, and Mac. Works with Apple’s Find My network—pair once and track from the Find My app.
items.title: JioTag Air

items.title: Next-gen chip for peak AI performance.

items.description: Choose the size that fits you.

items.description: Stay current for years to come.

items.description: Pixel will create a high-quality short video with sound for you.

items.title: Make high-motion scenes feel cinematic

items.title: Pro Zoom with up to 100x zoom range

sections.body: Google's most capable AI is built into the most powerful Pixel yet, enabled by the new Google Tensor G5 chip custom-designed for the latest Gemini innovations.
sections.title:
The power of Gemini, 
supercharged on Pixel.

items.description: Create a high-quality short video, complete with natural-sounding audio, simply by describing your idea.
items.title: Set your creative ideas in motion

items.description: Share your camera in Gemini Live to have a back-and-forth chat about what's around you.
items.title: Talk to Gemini about anything you see

items.description: Go Live with Gemini to have a natural, free-flowing conversation. Just start talking to get info, brainstorm ideas and more.
items.title: Ask Gemini about anything, from anywhere

items.description: Curious about something you're browsing? Just ask Gemini for more details.
items.title: Talk through whatever's on your screen

items.description: Save time by asking Gemini to find info and get things done for you - like checking your calendar, then texting a reminder.
items.title: Ask Gemini to multitask across your apps

sections.body: Boost your productivity and creativity with more access to new and powerful features in the Gemini app plus 2 TB of cloud storage.
sections.title: Unlock Google AI Pro for a year on us (£227 value).

items.description: Introducing Magic Cue, a suite of new AI-powered capabilities for Pixel that proactively suggests helpful information, right as you need it. A friend texts asking the location for dinner? Magic Cue can surface the answer ready to share with a tap.
items.title: The right info, right when you need it.

items.description: Live Translate can now translate what each caller says using the sound of their voice - so phone conversations in different languages feel more authentic.
items.title: Real-time call translations, in their natural voice.

items.description: Just use your finger to draw a circle around what you want more info about - like an image, text or video. Pixel finds it fast, straight from the app you're in.
items.title: Searching has come full circle.

sections.title: More ways to work wonders with Google AI.

sections.body: Pixel's pro camera makes everything look cinematic by default, even in low light. Bring out incredible details with 50 MP portraits, our most advanced AI for 100x zoom, and steadier videos in up to 8K.
sections.title:
The Pixel 10 Pro camera. 
Next-level everything.

items.description: Play up any angle like a pro. Go into greater detail with super-sharp Macro Focus, or capture sweeping, wide-angle landscape shots.
items.title: 48 MP ultrawide

items.description: Our best camera yet. Capture beautiful portraits and vivid low-light photos and videos with its ƒ/1.68 aperture.
items.title: 50 MP wide

items.description: Pixel 10 Pro's upgraded 5x telephoto lens has our longest and best zoom quality ever. Up to 100x Pro Res Zoom.
items.title: 48 MP telephoto

items.description: Pixel's widest selfie camera with autofocus features a 103° field of view. Sharper selfies from any angle.
items.title: 42 MP front-facing

items.description: Zoom in up to 20x with Super Res Zoom Video, enabled by a powerful telephoto lens and advanced processing.
items.title: Up to 20x the video zoom power

items.description: Night Sight Video brings out the best, highest-quality 8K recordings on a Pixel.
items.title: Low-light videos get a glow-up

items.description: Zoom like never before with up to 100x Pro Zoom. Powered by an upgraded telephoto camera and all-new AI imaging.
items.title: 100x. Pixel's longest zoom ever

items.description: Pixel's best portrait quality to date. Get high-res images worthy of professional editing and printing right from your phone.
items.title: 50 MP portraits from a smartphone

items.description: Camera Coach uses Gemini models to read the scene, offer you suggestions and help you find the best angle and lighting.
items.title: Snap your best pics with coaching from Gemini.

items.description: Making studio-quality edits is effortless with Google Photos. Adjust the focus, change the background, and move objects with a few taps.
items.title: Talk about easy photo editing.

items.description: With Pixel, it's a snap to take shareable group pics. Pixel can automatically find and combine similar photos into one where everyone looks their best.
items.title: Group pics the whole group loves.

items.description: With the updated Add Me, it's even easier to make sure no one's left out of the photo. Add the photographer to bigger groups.
items.title: Take the picture. And be in it, too.

sections.title: As resilient as it is brilliant.

sections.body: The new Google Tensor G5 chip is Pixel's biggest leap in performance yet. It's custom built with a TPU that's up to 60% more powerful and a CPU that's 34% faster on average for Google's most-advanced AI and performance.
sections.subhead: Next-gen chip for the ultimate AI experience on a phone.
sections.title: Breakthrough performance.

items.description: Pixel 10 Pro XL charges to 70% in about 30 minutes for ultrafast wired charging. Both models last up to 100 hours on Extreme Battery Saver.
items.title: 24+ hours of battery life.23

items.description: Pixel 10 Pro phones now have Pixelsnap, magnetic technology that lets you snap on Qi2 wireless chargers for fast, efficient charging. You'll also have a world of magnetic accessories to choose from – stands, grips, wallets, and more.
items.title: Charges wirelessly in a snap.

sections.body: Get regular automatic updates that amp up your Pixel's helpfulness by bringing you new and improved features for the camera, Gemini and more.
sections.subhead: Unlock what's next for your phone with Pixel Drops.
sections.title: Get that new-phone feeling every few months.

items.description: Pixel helps protect you against spam, scams, and phishing in messages by letting you know if a text seems sketchy.
items.title: Pixel helps secure your messages

items.description: If a theft is detected, Theft Detection automatically locks your phone to give you peace of mind that your sensitive information stays private.
items.title: Automatically locks if it's lost or stolen

items.description: Pixel has extra layers of protection to keep your info safe. And it gets regular updates for 7 years to help keep your phone secure over time.
items.title: Security and OS updates for 7 years

items.description: Your Pixel comes with a two year trial of Satellite SOS. Connect to emergency services via satellite to get help and share your location.
items.title: Going off the grid? Pixel has you covered

items.description: Control your camera, unlock your phone (or find it) and even know who's at your door when you pair your phone with the Pixel Watch 4.
items.title: Unlock your full potential with the Pixel Watch

items.description: With Fast Pair, Pixel Buds instantly connect to your phone for crystal clear calls, dynamic spatial audio and hands-free help with Gemini.
items.title: Connect with Pixel Buds for better clarity and focus

items.description: Protection that meets your style.
items.title: Pixel 10, Pro, Pro XL Case

items.description: Fast wireless charging.
items.title: Pixelsnap Charger

items.description: Hold your phone anywhere.
items.title: Pixelsnap Ring Stand

items.title: Pixelsnap Charger with Stand

items.description: 0% APR for 24 months. Pay over time with no interest.
items.title: Finance your Pixel

items.description: Extended warranty and accidental damage protection.
items.title: Preferred Care for added protection

items.description: Fast, free shipping on all orders.

sections.title: Why buy on the Google Store?

sections.headline: From telco to digital services brand: The story of Jio.

longFormParagraphs.text: In 2011, Isha Ambani came home from Yale for the holidays and tried to submit coursework online. The internet at home — in one of Mumbai's most privileged addresses — was too slow to work. She told her father. Her brother Akash added something that stuck: in the old world, telecom meant voice. In the new world, everything is digital.
Mukesh Ambani listened. And then he spent the next five years building something India had never seen.

paragraphRows.body: The foundation had actually been laid earlier, quietly. In 2007, Reliance Jio Infocomm was incorporated. In 2010, Reliance acquired Infotel Broadband — the only company to have won 4G spectrum across all 22 telecom circles in India — for ₹4,800 crore. It was a precise, strategic move. The scale of what it would become was not yet visible to the outside world.

sections.imageAlt: Farmer with tablet in crop field

longFormParagraphs.text: On 27 December 2015 — the eve of what would have been Dhirubhai Ambani's 83rd birthday — Jio soft-launched internally. Nine months later, on 5 September 2016, it opened to the public.

paragraphRows.body: What followed was one of the largest private infrastructure investments in history. Over $31 billion. A pan-India all-IP network, designed not around voice but around data. Not built for the India that existed — built for the India that was coming.

sections.imageAlt: Customer using phone in a colourful shop

longFormParagraphs.text: What happened next was unlike anything the telecommunications industry had ever recorded.

Within 83 days, Jio had 50 million subscribers. India, which had ranked 155th in the world for mobile broadband consumption, became number one within a year. The cost of 1GB of data collapsed by over 95%. People who had owned phones for years but couldn't afford to use them were suddenly online — not in the millions, but in the hundreds of millions.

sections.blockTitle: What it meant on the ground

longFormParagraphs.text: The numbers tell one story. The lives behind them tell another.

For the first time, a farmer in Rajasthan could check market prices before selling his crop. A student in Bihar could access video lessons from a teacher she would never meet in person. A small business owner in Lucknow could accept a digital payment from a customer two states away. These were not small conveniences. They were structural shifts in how people could participate in the economy.
The industry convulsed around it. Competitors merged, collapsed, or dramatically restructured. Prices fell across the board. A market defined by scarcity became defined by abundance.

sections.title:
"Jio has already grown to be the biggest start-up in India's history."

Mukesh Ambani

sections.blockTitle: Twelve verticals. Every dimension of Indian life.

longFormParagraphs.text: But Jio had never intended to be only a telecom. The network was always the foundation — the thing that made everything else possible.

In 2019, Jio launched its fibre home broadband service. Jio Platforms was established as the holding entity for India's emerging digital ecosystem — entertainment, finance, commerce, health, education, agriculture, energy, government services. Twelve verticals. Every dimension of Indian life.
In 2020, Facebook and Google invested a combined $10 billion, valuing Jio Platforms at over $65 billion. The world was paying attention.
In 2022, Akash Ambani became Chairman. The next generation taking forward what had started with a conversation between siblings about a slow internet connection.
That same year, Jio's 5G network launched — expanding at a pace no Indian operator had achieved before. The platform continued to grow. The ambition did not shrink.

Today, Jio serves over 500 million customers. It is the largest mobile network in India, the third largest in the world. And its ecosystem — twelve verticals touching every dimension of Indian life — is still being built.
The complaint that started it all turned out to be one that a billion people shared. Jio was the answer.
